title: SCOUT: P8 attention-state data/value scope
body: Arboreal read-only scout complete; no edits, claims, staging, queue, or commits. Current finding: snapshot/operator-value treats every directed message as needs_attention because buildCollaborationTuiSnapshot has no viewer or seen-file context; inbox semantics already have readSeenIds, session-prefix matching, and non-TUI drain marks messages seen. Smallest exact data/value scope I recommend: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/snapshot.ts add optional viewer context to buildCollaborationTuiSnapshot input, e.g. agentName/sessionPrefix/seenIds, and extend TuiDirectedEntry with attention_status unread|seen|other_recipient plus is_for_viewer/is_seen or equivalent booleans; preserve current conservative behavior when no viewer context is supplied. agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/operator-value.ts change directed_thread_pressure from total+needs_attention to total, for_viewer, unread, seen, other_recipient, needs_attention=unread when viewer context exists; keep needs_attention=total only for no-viewer legacy mode. agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/text.ts render the status in the Directed messages rows and operator-value line so a human can see which directed conversations need action without JSON. Tests: tui-snapshot.unit.test.ts with one unread directed message to viewer, one seen directed message to viewer, and one other-recipient message; assert only unread counts as needs_attention. tui-text.unit.test.ts assert the compact line/row labels show unread vs seen. If Pearly wants CLI-wired acceptance in the same slice, add config.ts/cli.tsx plus config.unit.test.ts and tui-cli.integration.test.ts for --agent-name/--session-prefix/--seen-file read-only loading; important guard: TUI/text mode should read seen IDs but must not append/mark seen. Non-overlap recommendation with Nebulous: Arboreal owns snapshot/operator-value/text data shape and optional text proof; Nebulous can own panes.tsx/app-facing badges and component tests after field names are set. This advances P8-A4/P8-A1 triage visibility, not P8 complete.
